textAr: ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
textEn: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two].

textAr: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
textEn: And if they see a sign [i.e., miracle], they turn away and say, "Passing magic."

textAr: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
textEn: And they denied and followed their inclinations. But for every matter is a [time of] settlement.

textAr: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
textEn: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence.

textAr: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَـٰلِغَةٌ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
textEn: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].

textAr: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
textEn: So leave them, [O Muḥammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,

textAr: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
textEn: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,

textAr: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
textEn: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day."

textAr: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
textEn: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.

textAr: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ
textEn: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."

textAr: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ
textEn: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down

textAr: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
textEn: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.

textAr: وَحَمَلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
textEn: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,

textAr: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
textEn: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.

textAr: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَـٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
textEn: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?

textAr: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
textEn: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

textAr: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
textEn: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

textAr: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
textEn: ʿAad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

textAr: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
textEn: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,

textAr: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
textEn: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.

textAr: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
textEn: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

textAr: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
textEn: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

textAr: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
textEn: Thamūd denied the warning.

textAr: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
textEn: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.

textAr: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
textEn: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."

textAr: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
textEn: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.

textAr: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
textEn: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.

textAr: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
textEn: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].

textAr: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
textEn: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].

textAr: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
textEn: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

textAr: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
textEn: Indeed, We sent upon them one shriek [i.e., blast from the sky], and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen.

textAr: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
textEn: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

textAr: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
textEn: The people of Lot denied the warning.

textAr: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَـٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
textEn: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn.

textAr: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
textEn: As favor from Us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.

textAr: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
textEn: And he had already warned them of Our assault, but they disputed the warning.

textAr: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
textEn: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning."

textAr: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
textEn: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.

textAr: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
textEn: So taste My punishment and warning.

textAr: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
textEn: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

textAr: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
textEn: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning.

textAr: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
textEn: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.

textAr: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
textEn: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scriptures?

textAr: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
textEn: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?

textAr: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
textEn: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat].

textAr: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
textEn: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter.

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
textEn: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness..

textAr: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
textEn: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."

textAr: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
textEn: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.

textAr: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
textEn: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.

textAr: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
textEn: And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember?

textAr: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
textEn: And everything they did is in written records.

textAr: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
textEn: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَهَرٍ
textEn: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers,

textAr: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
textEn: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.
